title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance:
Bajaj Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance!
